Okay, okay, so here we are so now I'm basically going to go over the overview of the actual Process that we're gonna lead the prospects through in order to come to the natural conclusion that they should totally buy Even though we have and work with us and do this program Okay, so this process can be modeled for fitness any kind of sales and you know obviously specific to the challenge But the way that it works is first thing that's gonna happen as soon as they walk in the door We're gonna clarify why they're there So you're gonna clarify the reason that they came the reason that they signed up for the program So you need to really glean that out of them and we'll get into more detail about that when we get to that point But you have to clarify why they're there. All right, awesome As soon as they tell you why they're there and it's and it's a reasonable one not like I just want to get more information But they're like I need to lose weight and you do whatever once you have that nugget Then you assign them that problem and that's that too you assign them the problem that they finally gave you so so you just reiterate it back to them and give them the problem you have to play If I if you don't if you don't have cancer, we can't cure you right? So they need to acknowledge that they have a problem that we can then in turn solve, okay? That's the second thing once they've acknowledged their problem and they've agreed to having that problem We then say awesome. What have you done in the past to try and solve the problem? And then they're gonna go through all of the things that they done in the past to solve the problem We're gonna go through a little pain cycle, which is basically, you know, what'd you do? How'd that work? We already know it didn't work because they're here, right? How'd that work? And how long did that work for right? So once they've done that and they're like what else did you do? What else did you do? What else did you do? And each time we're gonna ask those three questions And so you've exhausted everything that they've done and then once you've stacked that you reiterate it What they're whatever they did, you know, whatever they told you So you're just like and then and the thing is is when you're reiterating it You really need to dig into like how big of a deal it is. So it's like so you worked out for three days a week For a year and you only lost 10 pounds. So it's like it's 52 weeks times three It's 150 workouts probably an hour and a half each time So you did like 225 hours of working out and you and you didn't lose any weight Like that's gotta be really frustrating. You see how that's that versus like oh you did some working out And it didn't work So you really want to dig in to like what the cost was for them and like kind of the pain and frustration So they realize Why it didn't work, right? So that's the pain sequence then we do a quick short future amplification which forces action So you're saying like okay, so you've done all that stuff So you need to do like so so that's why you really came in you need to do something about this Is that is that right? But they're like yeah, because you can't keep going the way this is because you said like you're not gonna keep wait It's like if they haven't done it they hadn't had results It's like you're not gonna keep wasting all this time of money, you know not getting results, right? They're like no, it's like so you need to do something today. You need to act right? They're like, yeah Or if they if they're gaining weight because they're like coming in because I put 20 pounds on the last six months You're like awesome. I mean because if you keep doing that then You're from now whatever weight they already told you they were Just add, you know, it's six months a year from now be times two so be 40 pounds heavier So whatever that weight is add 42 like you step on that skill for and you're 40 pounds ever That'd be a big deal right so like you can't keep going the way you are right? They're like yeah, I can't keep going and so that what that does is it forces action through later later in the sale We'll cycle back so we can actually make them make a decision. All right, and then after that it's overcoming obstacles So the actual pitch where we're talking about the the benefits of the program and that kind of stuff is really short all those things that I told You in the overview video, we don't even mention all those things Those things are only come up if the obstacle related to that feature comes up like I'm gonna be traveling No worries. We have travel workouts. We have an eating out guide Well, you know like I'm gonna be going on vacation. No problem. So like you don't need to mention all that stuff because it gets them confusing it seems overwhelming It seems like work so you actually like we sell the vacation We don't sell the plane flight going through security to get there like how to cook it the workouts all that stuff That's the plane flight to get to the vacation We're selling the vacation which is how they're gonna look how they're gonna feel in six weeks the number on the scale Like the clothes they're not gonna get to be able to fit into the way their husband looks at them That's what we're selling.
